prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated 1275cc A-Series (998cc block sleeved to 1275cc, engine code 12A/649) with forged Mahle pistons (8.4:1 compression), Cunningham conrods, and a billet steel crankshaft from Mini Spares. Pair with a 276° camshaft from Kent Cams (276H) and a flowed cylinder head ported by David Vizard with oversized 1.5-inch SU HS6 carburetors on a custom fabricated intake manifold.

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB differential (8.1:1 ratio) in a strengthened Mini Spares 4-synchro gearbox, paired with a hybrid clutch from Helix Autosport (organic/puck hybrid) and a lightweight flywheel from Spec Clutches. Upgrade driveshafts to Hardy Spicer CV-jointed units with reinforced rubber couplings.

Suspension overhaul with adjustable coilovers from Gaz Shocks (Gold Pro Sport, 300lb/in front, 250lb/in rear) with polybushings from SuperPro, paired with a full roll cage from Safety Devices (FIA-spec bolt-in) and a quick-ratio steering rack from Mini Sport (12:1 ratio). Brake upgrade to 4-pot Wilwood calipers (Dynalite) on 220mm vented discs with Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using hand-formed aluminum panels (replicating the 1964 Monte Carlo works rally spec) with riveted flares and a bespoke front splitter from Mini Mania, paired with a rear diffuser from Kamei. Painted in original Morris Works livery (Alpine White with red/blue stripes) using Glasurit 22-Line basecoat.

Interior stripped and re-trimmed with Recaro SRD bucket seats (1960s-spec) upholstered in red Alcantara with period-correct black piping, paired with a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm) on a quick-release hub. Full digital dash from Race Technology (DL1) with analog Smiths gauges (oil pressure, water temp) in a custom aluminum dash panel.

Exterior lighting upgraded to Hella 160mm rally lamps (H1 bulbs) with custom aluminum mounts, paired with LED taillights from Osram (retro-fit into original housings). Wheels are 13x6-inch Minilite replicas (ET15) with Nankang AS-1 semi-slick tires (175/50R13) for track use, or 165R13 Dunlop SP Sport for road.
